name: Bryan Hughes

contactInfo.office: Texas Capitol Extension, Room E1.706, Austin, TX 78701

bio: Bryan Hughes represents Senate District 1 in the Texas Senate, covering much of East Texas including Tyler, Longview, and surrounding areas. A practicing attorney from Mineola, Hughes has served in the Texas Legislature since 2003, first in the House and then in the Senate since 2017. He chairs the Senate State Affairs Committee and is known for authoring major election integrity legislation.
campaignPromises: Protect election integrity and secure voting systems
Eliminate property tax for Texas homeowners
Protect water rights for East Texas landowners
Support law enforcement and public safety
